urdu transliteration text:
KASH ABBAS(A.S) NA MARAY JATAYxxxxxxEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Dekha jab baap ka laasha to Sakina royiShimr Ney maara Jo durra to Sakina royi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Bibi Sakina (a.s.) cried when she saw the body of her father,
Bibi Sakina (a.s) cried when Shimr whipped her

urdu transliteration text:
naa milaa paani usey aag bujhaaney ke liyeJalgayaa Bhai ka jhoola to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
She did not find water to put out the fire,
When her brother’s cradle got burnt then Sakina (a.s) cried

urdu transliteration text:
odhkar sarr pey ridaa kaan mey durr pehney huweySaamney aayi Jo ramlaa to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When Ramla came in front of Sakina (a.s.) with her head covered and wearing earrings, then Sakina cried

urdu transliteration text:
maarkar sayyad e mazloom ke hoto pey chadiiJab hasaa haakim e koofa to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
After hitting the lips of the oppressed Imam (a.s.),
When the ruler of Kufa laughed then Sakina (a.s.) cried

urdu transliteration text:
kya Sakina ho tumhi itna bataado BibiHind Ney aakey Jo poocha to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Please tell me Bibi if you are really Sakina (a.s.),
When Hind came and asked this, then Sakina (a.s.) cried

urdu transliteration text:
chaahti thi ke wo ley aaye usey qaimey meyBaap ka laasha e na uttha to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
She wanted to bring the body of her father into the tents,
But when she could not carry it then Sakina (a.s.) cried

urdu transliteration text:
qaid mey suntey huwey baap ke sarr LoriiZaqmi hoto ko Jo dekha to Sakina royi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
In the prison she listened to the voice from her father’s head,
But when she saw the wounded lips then Sakina (a.s.) cried

urdu transliteration text:
Mir Sajjad wo naaqey se girii Royi nahiAakey daadi Ney uthaaya to Sakina royii
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Bibi Sakina (a.s) did not cry when she fell from the camel,
But when her grandmother carried her up then Sakina (a.s.) cried
